zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma d'Harcourt於大約1206年出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾時，她的父親Richard d'Harcourt I28歲，母親Mathilde de La Roche-Tesson21歲。她於大約1223年與John Porter在英國武斯特斯爾德福德結婚。她去世於1265年11月在英國英格蘭波克夏沃吉加姆享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emma d'Harcourt于大约1206年出生在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾时，她的父亲Richard d'Harcourt I28岁，母亲Mathilde de La Roche-Tesson21岁。她于大约1223年与John Porter在英国武斯特斯爾德福德结婚。她去世于1265年11月在英国英格兰波克夏沃吉加姆享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'Harcourt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the places in Eure and Calvados named Harcourt, from Old French cour(t) ‘court, farmyard’ (see Court ) with an obscure first element. This surname is very rare in France.

English: habitational name from either of two places in Shropshire named Harcourt. The one near Cleobury Mortimer gets the name from Old English heafocere ‘hawker, falconer’ + cot ‘hut, cottage’; the one near Wem has as its first element Old English hearpere (see Harper ).

History: The surname of French origin (see 1 above) is listed along with the equally rare or even extinct variants or altered forms Haraucourt, Herancourt, and Héraucourt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Court
meanings: English: topographic or occupational name from Middle English curt, court ‘large house’ (a word of the same ultimately Latin origin as 2 below), denoting someone who lived or worked in a manor house or castle, a courtly retainer.
French: topographic name from Old French co(u)rt ‘court, farmyard’ (from Latin cohors, cors, genitive cohortis, cortis ‘court, farmyard, enclosure’).

English and French: nickname for a physically small man, or ironically for a large man, from the adjective Middle English curt, Old French co(u)rt ‘short, small’ (from Latin curtus ‘curtailed, truncated, cut short, broken off’). Compare French Lecourt .

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma d'Harcourt was born about 1206, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard d'Harcourt I, was 28 and her mother, Mathilde de La Roche-Tesson, was 21. She married John Porter about 1223, in Defford, Worcestershire, England. She died in November 1265, in Wokingham, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma d'Harcourt est née environ 1206, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard d'Harcourt I, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de La Roche-Tesson, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé John Porter environ 1223, à Defford, Worcestershire, Angleterre. Elle est décédée en novembre 1265, à Wokingham, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.Stanton St John, Oxfordshire, England: Stanton St John, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Emma d'Harcourt um 1206 in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard d'Harcourt I 28 und ihre Mutter Mathilde de La Roche-Tesson 21. Sie hat um 1223 in Defford, Worcestershire, England John Porter geheiratet. Sie starb im November 1265 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Wokingham, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Emma d'Harcourt(이)가 대략 1206년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard d'Harcourt I(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde de La Roche-Tesson(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1223년 영국 워스스터실르 데퍼드에서 John Porter(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1265년 11월 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 보킨그함에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma d'Harcourt родилась около 1206 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard d'Harcourt I было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de La Roche-Tesson, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Porter около 1223 г. в местности деффорд, ворсестиршир, Англия. Она умерла ноябрь 1265 г. в местности вокингхам, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.
